en: Here we go. M&M Pieces of Advice for the Kids. Number ten.
ja: M&Mから子供たちへのアドバイス。
vi: Nhung loi khuyen cua M&M danh cho tre em.

en: Keep it real. That's right. Keep it real.
Number nine. No one's ever regretted a tattoo.
ja: タトゥーを後悔した人はいない。
vi: Chua ai tung hoi han ve hinh xam.

en: Number eight. With foreign markets volatile, now's a good time to invest in bombs.
ja: 今は債券に投資するいい時期だ。
zhTW: 現在是投資債券的好時機。
vi: bay gio la thoi diem tot de dau tu vao trai phieu.

en: I think he's right. I think he's right.
Number seven. Go see Toy Story 3. The toys are back in town.
ja: おもちゃたちが帰ってきた。
vi: Nhung mon do choi da quay lai.

en: Number six. Always purchase music through authorized retailers
ko: 항상 아티스트에게 로열티를 지불하는 공인 판매처에서
ja: 音楽は必ず、アーティストにロイヤリティを支払う
zhTW: 一定要透過向藝人支付版稅的
vi: Luon mua nhac qua cac nha ban le duoc uy quyen

en: that pay royalties to the artists.
ja: 正規の小売店を通じて購入しろ。
vi: tra tien ban quyen cho nghe si.
